icon-size.tooltip: Size of the tray icons, in pixels. Lower this to match the panel's system icons.

hide-note.description: To hide or show icons: right-click the panel and turn on Panel edit mode (under Troubleshoot) — this adds spacing between applets so you can right-click 11tray and use the per-icon switches. Turn edit mode off when done. You can also Ctrl+click any icon at any time. Hidden icons live in the drawer behind the arrow.
